sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value FLOAT, dt DATE, interval_col INTERVAL);
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (1, 5.0, '2023-01-01', INTERVAL 1 DAY), (2, 10.0, NULL, INTERVAL 2 HOURS), (3, NULL, '2023-01-03', INTERVAL 3 HOURS);
SELECT stats(value + INTERVAL 1 HOUR) AS value_stats FROM test_data WHERE dt IS NOT NULL;
SELECT stats(NULLIF(value, 10.0) + INTERVAL (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_data) DAY) AS adjusted_value FROM test_data;
SELECT stats(value + INTERVAL ABS(value) DAY) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS subquery;
SELECT dt, stats(interval_col + INTERVAL 1 HOUR) FROM test_data GROUP BY dt HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT stats(AVG(value) + INTERVAL 1 DAY) FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY dt ORDER BY dt ASC;
SELECT v.id, stats(value + INTERVAL 2 HOUR) AS adjusted_value FROM test_data v JOIN (SELECT id, value FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS filtered ON v.id = filtered.id;
SELECT stats(COALESCE(value, 0) + INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS coalesced_stats FROM test_data;
SELECT stats(value + INTERVAL (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_data) HOUR) FROM test_data WHERE dt = (SELECT MIN(dt) FROM test_data);
